name: logistics coordinators for freight brokers processing 10-20 deliveries/week tool
description: For logistics coordinators for freight brokers processing 10-20 deliveries/week, inefficient routing causes delayed deliveries. We provide optimized routing software instead of manual route planning and Excel spreadsheets.

problem_solved: Inefficient routing of delivery vehicles leading to increased fuel costs and delayed deliveries.
